title: Cutting Shop
overview: This is the first Indian film which is wholly based on the life of a film editor. Tonally, the film narrates a young man's (editor's) life, whose dreams are unusual, in a comical and entertaining way.. This film subtly puts across a message that success has no certain set of rules which have to be followed in life to achieve it. We don't necessarily have to excel in academics, get a good job, handsome salary etc. Success lies in happiness and in being able to do what we want in life.
